_description: 4-step procedural lifeform generation. Roll on each sub-table in sequence. Campaign Lifeform Encounters table has 10 slots (D100 mapping below). If slot is blank, generate new lifeform. 6+ Lifeforms in a mission: 6th is pack leader (+2 KP).

step_1_mobility._note: If the roll ends in 0 or 5, creature is Partially Airborne (ignores terrain, hovers 1 inch above, +1 to hit while hovering).

step_2a_combat_skill._note: If roll ends in 0 or 5, also roll on Special Attacks table.

step_2b_strike_power._note: If roll ends in 0 or 5, also roll on Special Attacks table. If BOTH Combat Skill AND Strike Power rolls end in 0 or 5, roll TWICE on Special Attacks (ignore duplicate).

entries.description: Melee, +0 Damage
Melee, +1 Damage
Melee, +2 Damage

entries.name: Razor Claws
entries.description: Melee attacks negate Saving Throws.

entries.name: Eruption
entries.description: When the creature activates, roll D6 to hit every character within 6 inches and Line of Sight. On 6, they take a Damage +0 hit, and are knocked Sprawling.

entries.name: Shoot
entries.description: The creature has a ranged attack. Range 18 inches, Damage 1. On a natural 6 to hit, it may shoot again. Shooting creatures use their Combat Skill when shooting and count as +0 when brawling.

entries.name: Spit
entries.description: The creature can spit acid or poison. Range 9 inches. The target and every figure within 1 inch is hit on a D6 roll of 5-6. Damage +0. Ignores Armor.

entries.name: Overpower
entries.description: A character that is hit but survives is thrown 1D6 inches backwards. If the creature also has a ranged attack, this applies to the ranged attack ONLY.

entries.name: Ferocity
entries.description: When the creature initiates brawling, it rolls twice and picks the best die. This bonus does not apply if one of your characters moves to engage it.
Armor Saving Throw of 5+
Dodge: The creature can evade any hit on a D6 roll of a 6, even if the attack would normally negate Saving Throws.
Armor Saving Throw of 5+

step_4_unique_ability._note: Randomly pick one creature at the start of each enemy phase. The ability activates from that creature. While only a single creature is on the table, it always activates its ability.

entries.name: None
entries.description: No special abilities of any kind.

entries.name: Pull
entries.description: The closest character in sight is pulled 1D6 inches closer. If this pulls them into contact, brawl immediately. If the Lifeform inflicts any hits, they are resolved with +2 Damage (in place of any normal attack capability the Lifeform has).

entries.name: Jump
entries.description: The Lifeform jumps 1D6+1 inches towards the nearest character. It will clear Human-height obstacles and if the jump takes it into or past an enemy, they are knocked Sprawling.

entries.name: Teleport
entries.description: Teleports to a location 2D6 inches away in a random direction. If it would teleport off the table, replace the figure with a blip at the battlefield edge.

entries.name: Paralyze
entries.description: All characters within 6 inches and Line of Sight must roll 1D6+Savvy. If they fail to score a 4+, they cannot act next time they are activated.

entries.name: Terror
entries.description: All characters within 6 inches and Line of Sight must roll 1D6+Savvy. If they fail to score a 5+, they retreat 1D6+Speed inches and become Stunned.

entries.name: Confuse
entries.description: The closest character must roll 1D6+Savvy. If they fail to score 6+, they immediately take a full move in a random direction. If they move off the table, they cannot return during the battle.

entries.name: Hinder
entries.description: All characters within 8 inches have their movement halved next time they activate.

entries.name: Knock Down
entries.description: Roll 1D6. Any characters within this range in inches are knocked Sprawling.
